calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: James J. Ficenec, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered the case dismissed at the request of the plaintiff. Sanctions previously imposed on 11/30/18, 2/6/19 and 4/9/19 against plaintiff's counsel are vacated. Sanctions previously imposed on 5/9/18 and 7/17/18 against plaintiff's counsel remain outstanding. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

**Clerk was instructed by the Court to add to the proof of service plaintiff's counsel's current address per the State Bar of California: Newmeyer & Dillion, 1333 N California Blvd, Ste 600, Walnut Creek, CA 94596-4551.**

This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar pursuant to Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
